name: Judith Malina
description: German-born American theater and film actress, writer and director
abstract: Judith Malina (June 4, 1926 – April 10, 2015) was an American actress, director and writer. With her husband Julian Beck, Malina co-founded The Living Theatre, a radical political theatre troupe that rose to prominence in New York City and Paris during the 1950s and 1960s.

about_quotes.speaker: Jackie McLean
about_quotes.evidence: But right away, Judith Malina came to me and said, “Look, Jackie, you’re going to have to take his place.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Jackie McLean — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
